channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Fix this code'—The three words behind the U.S. government decision that shut down Anthropic's Fable and Mythos AI models
item.description: The Fable jailbreak was trivially easy, an independent security researcher found. But she and other experts say Fable's value to cyber defenders outweighed the risks.

item.title: Knicks superstar Jalen Brunson leads New York to NBA title, credits his basketball legend dad for preparing him
item.description: NBA Finals MVP Jalen Brunson led the Knicks to victory, scoring nearly half the points in the game. He credited his drive to his father, Rick Brunson.

item.title: OpenAI and Oracle plan one of America's biggest data centers in a state where tree mortality tripled last year
item.description: New Mexico lost 209,000 acres of forest to drought and insects last year. Now a data center may pull millions of gallons of water from the same area.

item.title: How SpaceX's debut compares to other major IPOs
item.description: After a strong start, questions remain about the company's path to profitability.
